commands.review_summary:
The PR extracts hardcoded overview, sessions, and channels Control UI strings into i18n keys and adds English/zh-CN translations plus regenerated locale metadata.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking review finding: source comparison shows the current-main server-log leakage warning is replaced by generic localized fragments on PR head. No for the claimed after-fix UI proof, because both screenshot links return 404.
